properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 154/21
 1. NORWEGIAN SEA. VESTERAALEN. ANDOEYA NW. ROCKET LAUNCH OPERATION C-REX-2.
 A SCIENTIFIC ROCKET WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOEYA SPACE. 
 THE ROCKET LAUNCH WILL BE CONDUCTED WITHIN THE PERIOD 1 TO 17 DECEMBER 2021 BETWEEN 0745 AND 1145 UTC
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREAS

 C-REX-2 DANGER AREA INNER
 CHARTS 81,312
 A. 69-16.8N 016-03.0E
 B. 69-21.5N 016-06.6E
 C. 69 26.4N 016-00.0E
 D. 69-25.2N 015-49.8E
 E. 69-22.8N 015-40.2E
 F. 69-17.3N 015-50.2E
 G. 69-16.8N 016-03.0E

 C-REX-2 DANGER AREA MIDDLE
 CHART 312
 A. 69-26.5N 015-43.6E
 B. 69-29.0N 015-52.3E
 C. 69-34.0N 015-53.0E
 D. 69-38.8N 015-44.2E
 E. 69-39.7N 015-30.0E
 F. 69-36.6N 015-20.1E
 G. 69-31.4N 015-21.0E
 H. 69-27.3N 015-30.0E
 I. 69-26.5N 015-43.6E

 C-REX-2 DANGER AREA OUTER
 CHARTS 303, 515
 A. 71-58.9N 010-09.7E
 B. 72-17.3N 011-47.3E
 C. 72-50.9N 010-50.6E
 D. 72-30.7N 008-58.6E
 E. 71-58.9 N 010-09.7E

 2. SEE WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO AND WWW.BARENTSWATCH.NO/FISKINFO FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS.
